{
  "judge_id": "demo-judge",

  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The text mentions a prior work (CalibVar-v1) but doesn't clearly articulate the delta beyond stating improved performance.",
    "R1.7": "There is no explicit mention of missing or wrong citations, but the lack of engagement with broader literature in this field suggests potential omissions.",
    "RX.1": "The text presents all claims as factual without acknowledging uncertainty in any specific areas.",
    "RX.3": "The text focuses on three benchmarks, suggesting a reasonable adherence to scope. However, there's no explicit confirmation of covering the exact agreed-upon set.",
    "RX.4": "No evidence of harmful content or regressions is presented.",
    "RX.5": "There is no discussion of source attribution or traceability for the claims made."
  },
  "confidence": {

    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.9,

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The text mentions a prior work (CalibVar-v1) but doesn't clearly articulate the delta beyond stating improved performance.
rationale.R1.7: There is no explicit mention of missing or wrong citations, but the lack of engagement with broader literature in this field suggests potential omissions.
rationale.RX.1: The text presents all claims as factual without acknowledging uncertainty in any specific areas.
rationale.RX.3: The text focuses on three benchmarks, suggesting a reasonable adherence to scope. However, there's no explicit confirmation of covering the exact agreed-upon set.
rationale.RX.4: No evidence of harmful content or regressions is presented.
rationale.RX.5: There is no discussion of source attribution or traceability for the claims made.
